config.title: Zmiana parametrów bieżących #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50120" #include "50126" #include "50203" #include "50516" #include "50200" #include "50101"
dim rks dim jo dim today dim wyk dim ok:ok = false
function fopen:fopen = std_fopen() #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif
dim idrks:idrks = trans_.var(GVAR_ROKKSIEG) if idrks < 1 then set rks = nothing else set rks = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ROKKSIEG , idrks ) end if
dim idjo if trans_.isvar(GVAR_CURR_JO) then idjo = trans_.var(GVAR_CURR_JO) else idjo = 0 trans_.var(GVAR_CURR_JO) = clng(0) end if
if idjo < 1 then set jo = nothing else set jo = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG , idjo ) end if
today = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)
set wyk = getCurrentWykonawca() end function
function c##CTRL_RKS##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRL_RKS##_ongetdata=true if rks is nothing then oCtrl.text = "<brak>" else oCtrl.text = rks.text end if end function
function c##CTRL_JO##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRL_JO##_ongetdata=true if jo is nothing then oCtrl.text = "<brak>" else oCtrl.text = jo.text end if end function
function c##CTRL_DATA##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRL_DATA##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.value = cdate(today) end function
function c##CTRL_DATA##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl , newValue): c##CTRL_DATA##_ondataentered=true today = oCtrl.value end function
function c##CTRL_WYK##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRL_WYK##_ongetdata=true if wyk is nothing then oCtrl.text = "<brak>" else oCtrl.text = wyk.text end if end function
function change_rok dim id:id = changeRKS(false) if id > 0 then set rks = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ROKKSIEG , id ) if srvDate > rks.dDataZakon then today = rks.dDataZakon else if srvDate < rks.dDataRozp then today = rks.dDataRozp else today = srvDate end if end if end if end function
function change_jo() dim choice : choice = fire_choice_list( TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG , "" ,"","" ,"","" ) if choice <> 0 then set jo = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG , choice ) end if end function
function change_wyk() dim choice : choice = fire_choice_list( TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA , "Bieżący wykonawca" ,"strIndeks","" ,"","" ) if choice <> 0 then set wyk = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA , choice ) end if end function
function save_settings(): save_settings = false if (rks is nothing) then view_message 6243, 0 exit function end if
if (today < rks.dDataRozp or today > rks.dDataZakon) then view_message 6245, 0 exit function end if
if (jo is nothing) then view_message 6244, 0 exit function end if
trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) = today trans_.var(GVAR_CURR_JO) = jo.idobj
dim user:set user = getCurrentUser() set user.pWykonawca = wyk
'Ustaw bieżący rok księgowy setCurrentRKS(rks.idobj)
save_settings = trans_.saveobjects() end function
function strSystemDate strSystemDate = trans_.afc.display.fulldate(today) end function
function fok() if save_settings() then page_.result = CMD_CHOICE page_.goback end if end function
function called_from_init() end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function

page.body:
Bieżący rok księgowy
Bieżąca jednostka organizacyjna
Bieżący wykonawca
Domyślna data
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
